narrative:
Westerville 3-B (precinct in Franklin County) has 782 registered voters, with 53.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.4%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.2 percentage points.
